statement: Under a CONSTRAINED (degrees-of-freedom > 0) fit on the mechanistic ORYZA2000 biomass + measured transpiration, the translocation structure reproduces the measured shoot (straw) BAFs across the C4-C12 PFCA/PFSA series at log10 RMSE < 0.3 (NOT the saturated W2 fit).

confidence.basis: threshold rule: statistic 'point'=0.16 < 0.3 is met (combine='latest', margin=0.14)
